en: Hear the word of the LORD, O children of Israel, for the LORD has a controversy with the inhabitants of the land. There is no faithfulness or steadfast love, and no knowledge of God in the land;
zh: 以色列人哪！你們要聽耶和華的話。 耶和華要與這地的居民爭辯， 因為在這地上沒有誠實，沒有慈愛， 也沒有認識 神的知識；

en: there is swearing, lying, murder, stealing, and committing adultery; they break all bounds, and bloodshed follows bloodshed.
zh: 只有起假誓、撒謊、殘殺、偷盜、姦淫、行強暴，以至流人血事件相繼而來。

en: Therefore the land mourns, and all who dwell in it languish, and also the beasts of the field and the birds of the heavens, and even the fish of the sea are taken away.
zh: 因此，這地必悲哀， 地上所有的居民、 田野的走獸、空中的飛鳥都必衰微、枯萎，連海裡的魚也要滅亡。

en: Yet let no one contend, and let none accuse, for with you is my contention, O priest.
zh: 雖然這樣，人人都不必爭論，不要彼此指責。 你的民像爭辯的祭司一樣。

en: You shall stumble by day; the prophet also shall stumble with you by night; and I will destroy your mother.
zh: 白天你要跌倒， 晚上先知也必與你一同跌倒； 我要毀滅你的母親。

en: My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge; because you have rejected knowledge, I reject you from being a priest to me. And since you have forgotten the law of your God, I also will forget your children.
zh: 我的子民因無知識而滅亡； 因為你拒絕了知識， 我必拒絕你，不讓你作我的祭司； 因為你忘掉了你 神的律法， 我也必忘記你的子孫。

en: The more they increased, the more they sinned against me; I will change their glory into shame.
zh: 祭司越增多，就越發得罪我， 我必把他們的尊榮變為恥辱。

en: They feed on the sin of my people; they are greedy for their iniquity.
zh: 他們藉著我的子民犯罪來養活自己， 渴望他們多有罪孽。

en: And it shall be like people, like priest; I will punish them for their ways and repay them for their deeds.
zh: 所以，祭司怎樣，人民也怎樣。 我必按他們的行為懲罰他們， 照他們的行為報應他們。

en: They shall eat, but not be satisfied; they shall play the whore, but not multiply, because they have forsaken the LORD to cherish
zh: 他們吃，卻吃不飽； 行淫，人數卻不會增多； 因為他們離棄了耶和華，不遵守他的命令。

en: whoredom, wine, and new wine, which take away the understanding.
zh: 淫行、酒和新酒，把人的心奪走了。

en: My people inquire of a piece of wood, and their walking staff gives them oracles. For a spirit of whoredom has led them astray, and they have left their God to play the whore.
zh: 我的子民求問木頭，由木杖引導他們， 因為淫蕩的靈使他們走迷了路， 他們就行淫不順從 神。

en: They sacrifice on the tops of the mountains and burn offerings on the hills, under oak, poplar, and terebinth, because their shade is good. Therefore your daughters play the whore, and your brides commit adultery.
zh: 他們在山頂上獻祭， 在岡陵上的橡樹、楊樹和栗樹之下獻祭燒香， 因為樹蔭美好。 所以你們的女兒行淫亂， 你們的兒媳犯姦淫。

en: I will not punish your daughters when they play the whore, nor your brides when they commit adultery; for the men themselves go aside with prostitutes and sacrifice with cult prostitutes, and a people without understanding shall come to ruin.
zh: 我卻不因你們的女兒行淫亂， 也不因你們的兒媳犯姦淫而懲罰她們， 因為你們男人自己離群與娼妓在一起， 又與廟妓一同獻祭。 這無知的人民必遭毀滅。

en: Though you play the whore, O Israel, let not Judah become guilty. Enter not into Gilgal, nor go up to Beth-aven, and swear not, "As the LORD lives."
zh: 以色列啊！你雖然行淫， 猶大卻不可犯罪， 不要往吉甲去， 不要上到伯．亞文， 也不要指著永活的耶和華起誓。

en: Like a stubborn heifer, Israel is stubborn; can the LORD now feed them like a lamb in a broad pasture?
zh: 以色列倔強， 好像倔強的母牛， 現在耶和華怎樣牧放他們， 好像牧放寬闊草場上的羊羔呢？

en: Ephraim is joined to idols; leave him alone.
zh: 以法蓮和偶像連在一起， 任憑他吧！

en: When their drink is gone, they give themselves to whoring; their rulers dearly love shame.
zh: 他們醉意全消以後， 就不斷行淫； 他們的官長最喜愛恥辱的事。

en: A wind has wrapped them in its wings, and they shall be ashamed because of their sacrifices.
zh: 風要把他們裹在翅膀裡捲去， 他們必因自己所獻的祭祀而蒙受羞辱。
